description: Gb1() POSTs telemetry to http-intake.logs.us5.datadoghq.com independently of the tengu_* d() funnel and the 1P OTEL sink. Short-circuit to no-op before any network activity.
note: Legacy (<=2.1.112) symbol name. Equivalent behavior covered by v2.1.114 name-agnostic patches. Kept for backward compat.
